hero.label: Tampa Bay's Recycling Leader Since 1990
hero.title: The World
hero.subtitle: Recycled concrete, asphalt, and aggregate materials for roads, driveways, and construction projects. Serving Tampa Bay for 42+ years.

about.title: Built on Decades of
about.text1: Global Recycling of Tampa Bay is owned by Max & Denise Sanchez. Max Sanchez has owned Star Quality Inc., the parent company, for over 42 years — a privately owned corporation with experience on Commercial projects alongside Skanska, Kimmins Contracting, Beck Group, and more.
about.text2: We played a key role in the D&M Business Park in Drew Park, excavating 14,400 cubic yards of contaminated soil and replacing it with screened materials and 12" of crushed concrete base below each building pad.
about.list4: Credit application available for business accounts

learning.title: Know Your
learning.lead: Educational guides on recycled aggregates from the people who work with them every day.

concrete.title: Why Use Recycled Concrete in Your Project?
concrete.desc: Cost savings, environmental impact, and LBR performance comparable to virgin materials.

asphalt.title: Benefits of Recycled Asphalt for Driveways
asphalt.desc: One of the most cost-effective base materials — how it works and when to use it.

roadBase.title: How to Calculate How Much Crushed Stone You Need
roadBase.desc: Tons vs cubic yards explained. A practical formula for contractors and homeowners.

cta.text: Pickup or delivery available. Tampa Bay contractors and homeowners welcome.

whatWeBuy.title: What We Sell
whatWeBuy.lead: We accept clean, recyclable construction materials. Contact us for pricing and delivery options.

concrete.title: Concrete
concrete.desc: Broken slabs, foundations, curbs, and clean concrete debris. No Trash.

asphalt.desc: Parking lots, driveways, roads. Clean asphalt millings and pavement.

rock.desc: Natural aggregates, limestone, and clean fill material.
